items.claim: Luke Riley is faster than Kai Kamaka.
items.quote: I think that Riley is slightly faster than Kamaka.

items.claim: Luke Riley is more athletic than Kai Kamaka.
items.quote: I think he's a little bit more athletic than Kamaka.

items.claim: Luke Riley hits harder than Kai Kamaka.
items.quote: I think he hits a bit harder than Kamaka.

items.claim: Kong Wong has a significant advantage over Tracy Cortez in striking.
items.quote: Kong Wong's got a big edge on the feet for sure.

items.claim: Kong Wong has poor defensive grappling and is susceptible to being choked out.
items.quote: Kong Wong has shown time and time again that she needs to come take my jiu-jitsu fundamentals class... some of the mistakes I see her making on the mat.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez has not shown progression or evolution in her recent fights.
items.quote: She got ran through in the rematch and it just shows like maybe she's not progressing. Maybe she's not evolving.

items.claim: Damian Pinas has a 5.5-inch reach advantage over Cesar Almeida.
items.quote: he is going to have a 5 and 1/2 in reach advantage

items.claim: Cesar Almeida is past his prime and will fall off in performance.
items.quote: I think is the point where Cesar Almeida absolutely falls off a cliff.

items.claim: Cesar Almeida lacks effective takedown defense and get-up ability.
items.quote: Cesar Almeida don't got no takedown defense or get up game.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra has successfully transitioned from heavyweight to middleweight, improving his conditioning and discipline.
items.quote: this guy used to be a fat heavyweight, drops all the way down to middleweight. And for him to do that, that means that he had to get his life in order.

items.claim: Zack Reese has improved his performance following previous losses in the UFC.
items.quote: he's taken those setbacks and he's come back every single time better
